overall.description: First-person perspective walking along the dirt shoulder of a rural highway in a video game environment (GTA V). The scene features continuous moderate traffic with cars, trucks, and motorcycles passing by, large electrical transmission towers lining the left side, and arid desert hills under bright midday sun.

large semi-truck with trailer passes on the highway

entered.detail: large metal lattice electrical transmission tower
multiple high-voltage power lines spanning across the highway
multi-lane asphalt highway with white lane markings
large orange highway billboard with white text
distant mountain range under clear sky

segments.scene_description: Walking along a rural highway shoulder with large transmission towers on the left and moderate traffic flowing on the right. The orange billboard is visible in the distance ahead, and the arid landscape features sparse desert vegetation and rocky terrain.

events.description: motorcycle passes by on the highway
road sign becomes visible on the left side of the shoulder

agents.ego_description: continuing along the shoulder as vehicles pass by frequently

notable_agents.action: semi-truck with colorful trailer driving past

entered.detail: metal road sign on a pole at the roadside

segments.scene_description: Continuing along the highway shoulder with the orange billboard now closer on the right. A road sign appears on the left and grows larger as we approach. Traffic remains steady with various cars and trucks passing by on the asphalt.

events.description: passing the road sign on the left shoulder
ambulance with emergency markings passes by on the highway

agents.ego_description: walking past the road sign with the terrain rising on the left

notable_agents.action: white ambulance with orange stripes driving past

entered.detail: sloped terrain with denser bushes and small trees

segments.scene_description: Walking past the road sign with the left side of the path becoming more elevated and vegetated. The orange billboard recedes into the distance on the right. An ambulance passes by on the highway, and the terrain features more prominent hillsides with scattered trees.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey along a rural highway shoulder that shifts from a flat, industrial corridor into a more elevated, vegetated hillside. It begins with a walk past towering electrical transmission towers and sparse desert scrub, while an orange billboard remains a distant marker ahead. As the camera advances, the billboard draws closer on the right and a road sign emerges on the left, growing in scale as steady traffic of cars and trucks flows past on the asphalt. The scene then shifts as the camera passes the sign, with the terrain on the left becoming more elevated and lush with scattered trees. Finally, the orange billboard recedes into the distance as an ambulance speeds by, leaving the viewer amidst more prominent hillsides under the bright midday sun.
